---
title: "Flow Final Conference"
event-date: "2026-06-11"
date: "2026-02-12"
categories:
  - Event
location: "University of Bern, Mittelstrasse"
author:
  - name: "Serena Tolino"
    role: "Organiser"
  - name: "Tobias Hodel"
    role: "Organiser"
---

The Flow Final Conference will take place on June 11–12, 2026, at the University of Bern (Mittelstrasse).

Further details will be shared closer to the event.
